news.title: CSIRO to persist with job cuts despite $387 million funding injection

news.title: CSIRO May 10: $387M Funding Won’t Stop 350 Job Cuts
news.snippet: CSIRO receives $387.4M federal funding but proceeds with 350 job cuts, raising questions about Australia's research strategy and competitiveness.
